description_long: This is a modern bungalow complex featuring a flat roof design and a sprawling, asymmetrical layout. The main building is surrounded by landscaped elements, including rows of trees, a greenhouse structure, and a large paved area, likely for parking or recreation. The property includes a swimming pool, multiple patios, and outdoor seating areas, with a mix of open and covered spaces. The exterior is finished in a combination of light and dark materials, with large windows and sliding doors providing ample natural light. The grounds are meticulously organized, with a clear separation between the residential, garden, and utility zones. The overall impression is of a luxurious, contemporary residence designed for both comfort and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow complex with landscaped grounds, a pool, greenhouse, and multiple outdoor living spaces. The design is open, asymmetrical, and features large windows and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, garage, and a row of trees lining the front, with the greenhouse and garden visible to the right.
description_view_1: From this angle, the greenhouse and organized rows of trees dominate the foreground, while the main building and pool are set further back.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the rear of the bungalow, with the pool, patios, and a large paved area clearly visible, as well as the greenhouse and garden to the left.
description_view_3: Here, the pool and outdoor living spaces are prominent, with the main building and garden areas extending into the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
